segment_label: Metro High Footfall Office Corridor GT
segment_description: These are urban kiranas in metro cities, characterized by extremely high footfall and proximity to offices, suggesting a strong 'on-the-go' shopper mission. Despite high SEC A/B household presence, VPO is moderate, indicating quick, small-basket transactions. Premium category sales are low, pointing to a need for convenient, mid-tier options.
segment_action: Introduce combo offers (e.g., beverage + snack) at Rs. 20-30 price points to increase average transaction value, leveraging high footfall and office proximity for quick consumption.
